caption: A man with dark hair and a light complexion, wearing a blue button-down shirt with a small "NFO-OBJECTS" logo on the chest, speaks while wearing a headset microphone. He is positioned in front of a light-colored backdrop featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". As he speaks, his facial expressions and head position shift slightly. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a small logo reads "#BigDataSV 2015". As the sequence progresses, a blue informational banner appears at the bottom of the screen containing the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015", "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room", and "San Jose, CA". This banner expands to include a "SPONSORED BY" section on the left featuring the "NFO-OBJECTS" logo. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the waist up as he delivers his presentation.
